response.justification: Candidate has ~20 years of solid full-stack engineering experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI builder fluency. The resume shows craftsman-level full-stack work without principal/staff-level strategic leadership, no recognized AI portfolio, limited cloud-platform depth, and no advanced degree in an AI field. Title progression also doesn't reach principal-level scope expected here.
strengths: ~20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and data-intensive microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks principal/director-level scope: advising strategic customers, shaping product strategy
Limited deep cloud-platform expertise (AWS CDK mentioned briefly; no GCP/Azure depth or architecture leadership)

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI portfolio for AI strategy role
